pi_items.verified_value: BBBC005 (Broad Bioimage Benchmark Collection - Synthetic Cells)
True - BBBC005 consists of computationally simulated images generated with the SIMCEP platform, not real microscopy
pi_items.source: https://bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC005/ official documentation states 'Simulated HCS images...generated with the SIMCEP simulating platform'

No pixel scale specification in BBBC005 official documentation. Since BBBC005 is synthetic, any scale is arbitrary. The value 0.650 um/pixel is a reasonable task parameter (typical for higher magnification fluorescence microscopy) but unverified as a specific claim about BBBC005.
This is a task parameter (user instruction to add a 50 micron scale bar), not a claim about the dataset
This is a task parameter (user instruction to create 1 row × 5 columns montage), not a claim about the dataset
This is a task parameter (user instruction for output location), not a claim about the dataset

pi_items.metadata_value: Not explicitly in metadata, but implied
pi_items.source: https://bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC005/ - 'Each image is 696 x 520 pixels in 8-bit TIF format'

pi_items.metadata_value: Implied by task requirement to select same F level
pi_items.verified_value: True - BBBC005 images have focus level designations (F1-F48), with F1 representing fully in-focus images
pi_items.source: https://bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC005/ - 'focus blur applied (1-48)' and 'images designated with _F1_ in the filename are classified as fully in-focus'

pi_items.metadata_value: Implied by task requirement to select different C values
pi_items.verified_value: True - BBBC005 images vary from 1-100 cells per image, encoded in filename with C variable
pi_items.source: https://bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC005/ - 'cells variable ranges from 1-100, where the number of cells simulated in the image is encoded'

pi_items.metadata_value: Data should be available for download
pi_items.verified_value: True - Dataset is publicly available for download

privileged_info_summary: The task uses BBBC005, a published Broad Bioimage Benchmark Collection dataset containing 19,200 computationally simulated fluorescence microscopy images (696 × 520 pixels, 8-bit TIF). Images include variable focus levels (F1-F48, with F1 fully in-focus) and cell counts (1-100 cells per image). The dataset is from a peer-reviewed benchmark and includes ground truth annotations. The pixel scale of 0.650 µm/pixel and 50 µm scale bar are task parameters without explicit BBBC005 documentation but are reasonable values for microscopy.
